{"task_id": "simple-sheets-put", "step_index": 4, "command": "curl -X PUT http://api:8000/sheets/1/cells/batch -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"updates": {"A1": {"value": "Month"}, "B1": {"value": "Revenue"}, "C1": {"value": "Expenses"}, "A2": {"value": "January"}, "B2": {"value": 10000}, "C2": {"value": 8000}, "A3": {"value": "February"}, "B3": {"value": 12000}, "C3": {"value": 9000}, "A4": {"value": "March"}, "B4": {"value": 15000}, "C4": {"value": 10000}}}'", "agent_analysis": "Excellent! I've created the sheet "Q1 Data" with ID 1. Now I need to add the data to the sheet. Looking at the API documentation, I can use either individual cell updates or batch updates. Since I have a table of data, the batch update endpoint would be more efficient.

I need to add the following data:
| Month    | Revenue | Expenses |
|----------|---------|----------|
| January  | 10000   | 8000     |
| February | 12000   | 9000     |
| March    | 15000   | 10000    |

And then calculate the profit for each row.

Let me prepare a batch update request to populate the data:", "terminal_result": "<returncode>0</returncode>
<output>

100   384  100    63  100   321  11198  57056 --:--:-- --:--:-- --:--:-- 76800

Use the correct batch endpoint path (e.g., /sheets/1/cells/batch/) or perform individual PUTs for each cell."
  },
